title: 2003 World 4-Stroke MX Championship Second-Place Award
collection: Harry’s Room — The Harry Leary Collection
description: A framed second-place award for the 19th Annual White Bros. World 4-Stroke MX Championship, April 12–13, 2003. It broadens Harry’s Room beyond BMX into connected motorcycle activity.
provenance_summary: Presented as part of the Harry Leary Collection; acquisition detail was not supplied in this source package.
qualifications: The event title, second-place result and April 12–13, 2003 dates are visible in the supplied image.
The attribution to Harry Leary comes from the collection description.
